case_title: GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY VS. ATRINDERPAL SAHLUWATIA et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-02-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME FILED BY ATTORNEY SALISBURY, DON R

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-02-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-30-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SAHLUWATIA, ATRINDERPAL LUXOR CAB COMPANY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-02-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-27-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-17-2011
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED OCT-24-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB COMPANY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-02-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
